# .github Redirect Stub Template

_These templates are used by the `generate-github-stubs` capability to produce redirect stubs in `.github/`. Each stub delegates to the canonical implementation in `lens.core/`._

_These templates live in the agent sanctum at `github-templates/redirect-stub.md`. Copy and substitute during generation._

---

## Workflow Redirect Stub

Use for files in `.github/workflows/`.

```yaml
# {stub-name}.yml
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# REDIRECT STUB — Do not edit this file directly.
# This workflow delegates to the canonical implementation in lens.core/.
#
# Canonical source: {canonical-path}
# Generated by: Governance Enforcement Engine (lc-agent-core-repo)
# Generated on: {generation-date}
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

name: "{stub-display-name} (via lens.core)"

on: {trigger-events}

jobs:
  delegate:
    uses: {canonical-workflow-ref}
    with:
      workspace-root: ${{ github.workspace }}
    secrets: inherit
```

**Substitution fields:**
- `{stub-name}` — filename without `.yml` (match canonical name exactly)
- `{canonical-path}` — relative path from stub to canonical file (for comment)
- `{canonical-workflow-ref}` — `{owner}/{repo}/.github/workflows/{name}.yml@{ref}` or local `{path-to-canonical}`
- `{trigger-events}` — GitHub Actions `on:` block (copy from canonical)
- `{stub-display-name}` — human-readable name for GitHub Actions UI
- `{generation-date}` — YYYY-MM-DD

---

## Prompt Redirect Stub

Use for files in `.github/prompts/`.

```markdown
---
# REDIRECT STUB — Do not edit this file directly.
# This prompt delegates to the canonical implementation in lens.core/.
#
# Canonical source: {canonical-path}
# Generated by: Governance Enforcement Engine (lc-agent-core-repo)
# Generated on: {generation-date}
---

This prompt is a redirect stub. The canonical version lives at:

`{canonical-path}`

Load and follow the canonical prompt. Do not implement behavior from this stub directly.
```

**Substitution fields:**
- `{canonical-path}` — relative path from stub to canonical prompt file
- `{generation-date}` — YYYY-MM-DD

---

## Validation Checklist for Generated Stubs

Before writing any stub to disk, verify:

- [ ] Stub filename matches canonical name exactly
- [ ] Canonical path is correct and resolvable from the stub's location
- [ ] For workflow stubs: `on:` trigger block matches canonical (no accidental scope change)
- [ ] For workflow stubs: no implementation logic in the stub itself
- [ ] `Generated by` and `Generated on` fields are populated
- [ ] Running the stub a second time (idempotency check) would produce the same file
